feedback.text: At present several payment processor institutions have been pressuring online marketplaces to remove legal NSFW content from their platforms or blockades by these processors. This gives these entities undue influence on the market and censors the creativity of the artists producing these works. This also creates an opening for these institutions to then go after for instance LGBTQ+ organisations because it is quite common for protesting organisations to mark their very existence as being NSFW. I would hope that all legal content should be processed by these companies, and not give them the ability to selectively censor the free speech of legal contant that they do not like.
